component.name: Walltz
component.summary: Create wallpapers from images with blur and color backgrounds

description.p: Walltz takes one or more images and produces a processed desktop wallpaper: zoomed blurred background, auto-extracted gradient, or solid color, with the original image overlaid and optional post-processing effects.
Features include adjustable Gaussian blur, 12 gradient presets, 6 mood palettes, saturation boost, vignette, film grain, chromatic aberration, photo frame, batch processing, and live preview.

ul.li: Blur mode with adjustable sigma (1–120), saturation boost, rotation
Solid colour, 12 gradient presets, or auto-gradient from source
6 mood palettes from two extraction algorithms (V1 + V2)
Vignette, film grain, chromatic aberration, photo frame
Multi-image batch queue with crossfade preview
